result.title: The Android Show: From OS to Intelligence System | Made by Google Podcast S9E5
result.description:
This isn't just an update; it's a new era for Android. In this episode, host Rachid Finge sits down with Dieter Bohn for a special behind-the-scenes look at the biggest evolution of Android in years. We're moving beyond an operating system and into a true "intelligence system," designed to give you back time and encourage a bigger life, not just a busier one.

This is the inside story of how Android is getting things done for you, so you can focus on what matters most.

03:11 – From Operating System to Intelligence System
09:24 – "Create My Widget" & Generative UI
14:07 – "Rambler" & The Future of Voice Typing
23:09 – Googlebook: The Next Generation of Laptops

#TheAndroidShow #MadeByGoogle #TechPodcast

result.title: Android Show Highlights: Googlebook, Gemini Intelligence & more.
result.description:
At the #TheAndroidShow | I/O Edition, we introduced Gemini Intelligence, a new class of laptops, upgrades to Android 17 and Android Auto, and more. Here’s what’s new.

#GoogleIO

result.title: Happy Mother’s Day #GoogleDoodle
result.description: Today’s #GoogleDoodle is a handcrafted tribute to the hands that hold, guide, and help us bloom. Happy Mother’s Day 🌷🖌️

result.title: Go from notes to study guide with Search 📝
result.description:
Get free finals study support with Search. Just press the AI Mode button, upload your notes, and press the blue Canvas button for a custom study guide.

#GoogleSearch #AIMode

result.title: Behind the Doodle: The Art of K-Pop Dance #GoogleDoodle
result.description:
Take a peek behind the AANHPI Heritage Month Doodle and see how K-pop dance crew @SHEROFFICIALS adapted the official @LESSERAFIM_official “Celebration” choreo for the #GoogleDoodle video  🎬💃🕺 

From the dance floor to the animation studio, here’s how we transformed every move into digital magic.

Track and official choreography: “Celebration” by @LESSERAFIM_official
